release_name: Safety, provenance, and deterministic reproducibility release
changes_since_v1_1_22: Released public tcga_rnaseq API 3.0.0 with breaking fail-closed validation for model artifacts, sample identifiers, matched expression values, and output paths; each file is written atomically and workflow stop states are explicit, without claiming an all-or-nothing directory transaction.
Made cohort adaptation disabled by default and an explicit transductive, composition-dependent opt-in with a minimum cohort size of 20 by default.
Marked threshold-calibration metrics as apparent/resubstitution estimates computed on the same labeled samples and added warnings when either class contains fewer than 10 samples.

Added locked external-validation cohort manifests, semantic cache fingerprints, content hashes, atomic cache writes, and run manifests; committed external metrics remain a historical snapshot because no post-fix live-network rerun was performed.

Added exact float32 cancer-type and float64 binary/LOCO reproduction entry points, Python 3.11+ lightweight scoring acceptance, a canonical Python 3.11/NumPy 1.26.4/pandas 2.3.3/SciPy 1.15.3/scikit-learn 1.8.0 training profile, Python 3.13 light-only CI, cross-platform acceptance, trusted-digest ZIP execution, and deterministic non-mutating release drift checks with canonical ZIP metadata.
changes_since_v1_1_21: Hardened tcga_rnaseq.read_matrix so missing expression paths, directory paths, and common pandas/OS read failures become user-facing ValueError messages.
Kept CLI missing-input failures from printing Python tracebacks or writing partial score outputs.
Expanded core unit and release safety tests for missing expression input handling.
changes_since_v1_1_20: Hardened validate_output_contracts.py so score and label sample identifiers are checked with the same non-empty, trimmed uniqueness contract used by calibration.
Added contract errors for leading or trailing whitespace in sample identifiers and duplicate sample IDs after trimming whitespace.
Expanded output contract unit tests for whitespace-only, padded, and trim-colliding sample identifiers.
changes_since_v1_1_19: Hardened run_tumor_normal_workflow.py so calibration label errors write a stopped_after_calibration_error manifest instead of surfacing an uncaught exception.
Preserved valid qc.json and scores.csv outputs on calibration failure while removing downstream threshold, calibration, and explanation outputs.
Expanded release safety tests for bad workflow calibration labels.
changes_since_v1_1_18: Hardened cohort_adapt_score.py label loading so missing or blank label sample IDs are rejected before metric alignment.
Kept numeric string labels and unmatched input samples behavior unchanged.
Added unit coverage for missing label sample identifiers in cohort adaptation.
changes_since_v1_1_17: Made public direct scoring, explanation, cohort-adaptation, and cancer-type prediction CLIs refuse low model-gene coverage by default before writing outputs.
Added shared gene-match validation helpers and explicit --allow-low-gene-coverage / --min-model-gene-match-rate CLI controls for reviewed override cases.
Expanded safety tests so no-model-gene inputs cannot silently produce score, explanation, or adapted-score outputs.
changes_since_v1_1_16: Hardened validate_output_contracts.py so malformed score CSVs cannot crash the example score consistency check.
Made missing score columns, non-numeric probabilities, row-count mismatches, and sample-order mismatches report explicit contract errors before probability or call comparisons run.
Added unit coverage for malformed score consistency inputs.
changes_since_v1_1_15: Made tcga_rnaseq.read_matrix reject pickled expression matrices by default because unpickling user-controlled files can execute code.
Kept trusted internal pickle cache loading available only through an explicit allow_pickle=True code path.
Updated public CLI documentation and safety tests so collaborator-provided expression matrices must use CSV, TSV, TXT, or Parquet.
changes_since_v1_1_14: Hardened validate_release_lite.py so malformed release_manifest.json content is reported as validation errors instead of crashing validation.
Hardened validate_release_lite.py and validate_zip_bundle.py so corrupt or mislabeled zip files return explicit FAIL diagnostics instead of raw zip exceptions.
Added unit coverage for malformed release manifests and bad zip archives in both release validation paths.
changes_since_v1_1_13: Hardened validate_output_contracts.py so non-empty threshold metric fields must be numeric instead of being silently ignored as NaN.
Kept blank optional youden_j values valid for rows where the metric is intentionally absent.
Added unit coverage for non-numeric threshold metrics and blank optional youden_j handling.
changes_since_v1_1_12: Hardened validate_output_contracts.py so malformed JSON top-level values are reported as contract errors instead of crashing validation.
Made calibration metric validation reject non-numeric, boolean, and out-of-range values with explicit diagnostics.
Made workflow manifest outputs validation reject non-object output maps and non-string output paths.
Added unit coverage for malformed JSON output contracts.
changes_since_v1_1_11: Made validate_release_lite.py reject duplicate file entries in the release zip instead of silently collapsing them into a set.
Made validate_zip_bundle.py reject duplicate member paths before extraction so archive overwrite ambiguity is caught early.
Added unit coverage for duplicate zip member detection in both release validation paths.
changes_since_v1_1_10: Hardened timeout reporting in run_release_acceptance.py and validate_zip_bundle.py so subprocess timeout output is normalized safely when Python returns bytes.
Made timeout stderr reports append the timeout summary without inserting an extra blank line.
Added unit coverage for timeout reporting helpers in release acceptance and zip-bundle validation.
changes_since_v1_1_9: Hardened validate_release_lite.py so release_manifest.json top-level metadata is checked against VERSION, RELEASE_METADATA.json, the manifest file count, and the validator forbidden-artifact deny-list.
Added defensive manifest-shape handling so malformed release_manifest.json content reports validation errors instead of crashing.
Added unit coverage for release manifest metadata validation and malformed manifest handling.
changes_since_v1_1_8: Reduced default audit_release_docs.py CLI noise by hiding INFO messages unless --show-info is used.
Kept informational documentation-audit messages in JSON output and added unit coverage for audit output formatting.
changes_since_v1_1_7: Expanded audit_release_docs.py to validate code-spanned local file and directory references, not only Markdown links and Python commands.
Added explicit allowlisting for generated workflow outputs, release sidecars, and full-development-tree-only references so unexpected stale paths fail the audit.
Reworked README.md file listings to distinguish files included in the lightweight bundle from full development tree-only maintenance and historical-analysis assets.
Clarified REPORT.md references to LOCO, cross-platform adaptation, cancer-type classifier, and maintenance artifacts so extracted release-lite users are not directed to missing local paths.
changes_since_v1_1_6: Made tcga_rnaseq.predict_proba() and score_binary_dataframe() reject invalid matched model-gene values by default unless explicitly allowed.
Made the low-level align_to_genes() helper strict by default because its legacy return shape cannot carry invalid-value reports.
Added shape and finiteness validation to predict_proba_from_aligned() for already-aligned matrices.
Moved invalid alignment reporting helpers into the shared tcga_rnaseq core and simplified CLI imports.
Updated external validation and cross-platform benchmark scripts to use the current deployable .npz model and explicit invalid-value handling.
Expanded unit and reproducibility tests for strict core scoring, aligned-matrix validation, and historical mean-imputed external benchmarks.
Hardened release documentation audits for INDEX.md version drift, broken local Markdown links, and strict release artifact validation commands.
changes_since_v1_1_5: Made cohort_adapt_score.py stop before writing adapted scores when matched values are missing, non-numeric, NaN, or infinite unless explicitly allowed.
Made cancer-type-classifier/predict_cancer_type.py reject invalid matched values before writing predictions unless explicitly allowed.
Added invalid-value summaries and output metadata for adaptation and cancer-type prediction CLIs.
Expanded safety and unit coverage for the remaining invalid matched-value CLI paths.
changes_since_v1_1_4: Made explain_scores.py stop before writing explanations when matched values are missing, non-numeric, NaN, or infinite unless explicitly allowed.
Added the same --max-invalid-cell-fraction and --allow-invalid-values controls to explanation generation as scoring.
Expanded safety and unit coverage for invalid matched values in explanation outputs.
Expanded hosted GitHub repository auditing for administrator-enforced branch protection, linear history, conversation resolution, protected release-tag rulesets, and Dependabot vulnerability alerts.
changes_since_v1_1_3: Added alignment diagnostics for invalid matched model-gene cells before training-mean imputation.
Made score_tumor_normal.py and the one-command workflow stop before writing scores when matched values are missing, non-numeric, NaN, or infinite unless explicitly allowed.
Added user-visible invalid-value summaries, override/tolerance flags, and safety-test coverage for the new scorer/workflow stop behavior.
changes_since_v1_1_2: Clarified and enforced that the public lightweight scoring CLI supports the pure NumPy logistic-regression path only.
Rejected ambiguous duplicate or Ensembl-version-colliding gene columns before scoring or QC.
Hardened cohort-adaptation label handling for numeric-string labels, missing matches, and extra label rows.
Made threshold calibration fail on accidental partial label joins unless explicitly relaxed.
Added hosted GitHub repository audit coverage for branch protection, release asset digest, topics, and open pip Dependabot PRs.
changes_since_v1_1_1: Added Zenodo and CodeMeta machine-readable software metadata.
Added a hosted-publication readiness audit covering secrets, large Git blobs, line endings, and release metadata consistency.
Updated CI to run the publication readiness audit and current GitHub Actions releases.
Clarified that legacy pickle/RF training artifacts are intentionally excluded from the public Git history.
changes_since_v1_1_0: Hardened binary scoring against non-finite input values and invalid model shapes.
Added explicit rejection of multiclass weights in tumor-vs-normal scoring paths.
Validated calibration inputs for duplicate samples, non-finite probabilities, and out-of-range thresholds.
Unified calibration metric behavior with the shared metrics core, including Youden-J tie-breaking.
Expanded always-on pytest coverage for shipped headline metrics, patient-disjoint split metadata, calibration validation, and release edge cases.
Added release source-parity and artifact sidecar validation so stale release-lite bundles are caught by acceptance checks.
Made release zip generation byte-reproducible across rebuilds.
changes_since_v1_0_0: Added shared core library tcga_rnaseq/ (io, align, score, metrics); all scoring CLIs now share one hardened, unit-tested implementation.
Fixed a silent gene-alignment bug: Ensembl IDs now match with or without the .version suffix in every scorer.
Added a top-level INDEX.md guided reading path.
Added a pytest regression suite (dev tree) locking in the verified metrics.

validated_boundary.intended: TCGA/CPTAC-like GDC STAR-Counts tumor-vs-solid-tissue-normal RNA-seq matrices
not_intended: direct hard calls on Toil/RSEM, GTEx, GEO, raw counts, FPKM, microarray, single-cell, or spatial data
healthy-population cancer screening without additional validation
